contract_claim: MIRRORED_SKILLS tuple is defined but never iterated or used to drive test generation. The individual test functions call _assert_in_sync directly. If a new skill is added to the tuple but a corresponding test function is not written, it will not be tested.
observed_behavior: MIRRORED_SKILLS tuple is defined but never iterated or used to drive test generation. The individual test functions call _assert_in_sync directly. If a new skill is added to the tuple but a corresponding test function is not written, it will not be tested.
